channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ubisoft co-founder Claude Guillemot dies in plane crash
item.description: Claude Guillemot and a flight instructor were flying a twin-engine Cessna 421 on Friday evening. An investigation is ongoing.

item.title: Russia releases 24 Filipinos after Philippine President Marcos speaks with Putin
item.description: Philippine officials noted reports that the individuals may have been victims of illegal job recruitment.

item.title: Grand Canyon braces for more extreme heat after three hikers die
item.description: Officials warn visitors about dangerous temperatures expected early next week at the park.

item.title: Iran live updates: Strait closed after deadly attacks on Lebanon, Tehran says
item.description: President Trump announced major U.S.-Israeli strikes against Iran on February 28.
